3080410.name: City Turn
3080410.description:
City Turn is a colourful 2D singleplayer, turn-based game. Purple player is the program.

Automated player is not AI generated; it's an algorithm.

Buildings are stored differently for each game on a game load.

On the replay buildings would be in the same place, but images to find and their location would be different.

The player is competing against a program (AI) in finding the same 5 images. There is 'Play in Order' mode in which 5 images should be found in order.

The city is 8x8 board of buildings and there is a map showing player's positions. Tip on the map is showing where the closest image might be, it's not guaranteed to be there as the game wouldn't have a point.

Player can win/loose points and be hit by the various objects, there are some coming out from the buildings too.

If not actively playing the ramp will appear.

There are 10 different buildings: caffes, market, hotel, gallery...

The idea is to memorise which and where image was found by you or another player. Instead of timer there's another player.
